description: Business letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Same sender as T-S AS 156.386 (PGPID 17956). Mentions: Abū l-Ḥasan; Ibn Ṣalḥūn; good buttons (azrār); walnut; an ointment (mirham). Regards to various people including Abū l-Ḥasan Ibn al-Shofeṭ and Hiba. There is a postscript on verso. Mentions Ibn Yeḥezqel; Abū l-Faḍl b. al-[...]; green walnut; two pillows and two dabīqī somethings; and ʿEzra b. Shuwayʿ. (Information in part from CUDL.)
